name: Jolie Retiene
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton female wearing lower-level clothing. Armed with an iron mace.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: farmer, peaceful, simple, homebody, victim, wife
Role: Jolie Retiene is a farmer living in the small town of Water's Edge with her husband Eduard. She and her husband live a quiet, simple life together, preferring to stay indoors. Like most residents of Water's Edge, she becomes a tragic victim of the Blackwood Company during their brutal raid. She carries an iron mace and a few gold coins.
Home Location Information: Her house in Water's Edge, which she shares with her husband Eduard.
Daily Routine: Jolie spends her entire life inside the house with Eduard. They share a two-hour lunch at midday and a two-hour dinner at 6pm. She never sleeps. This peaceful routine ends when she is killed by the Blackwood Company during the Infiltration quest, after which her body is placed in the center of the village.
Personality - The Simple Farmer: Jolie lives a quiet, contented life with her husband, preferring the safety and comfort of their home to venturing outside. Her peaceful existence represents the innocent, ordinary lives destroyed by the Blackwood Company's savage attack on Water's Edge.
author: Bethesda
